allies.rationale_text: Feedback-loops gives adaptation the signal structure it needs to revise behavior under changing environmental conditions.
allies.source_quote: understanding feedback loops allows for smarter planning and decision-making

allies.rationale_text: Systems-thinking helps adaptation diagnose the machine-level causes that must change rather than only reacting to symptoms.

antagonists.rationale_text: Confirmation-bias blocks adaptation when new signals are interpreted to defend the current path instead of changing it.
antagonists.source_quote: The innate drive to seek out and interpret information that affirms existing beliefs prevents genuine adaptation.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Adaptation conflicts with commitment-bias when prior commitments suppress necessary course-correction under new evidence.
structured_tensions.source_quote: adaptation vs commitment-bias: prior commitments suppress necessary course-correction under new evidence.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Adaptation conflicts with optimization-theory when local objective maximization reduces the experimentation needed for system learning.
structured_tensions.source_quote: adaptation vs optimization-theory: local objective maximization reduces experimentation needed for system learning.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Adaptation conflicts with confirmation-bias when feedback is interpreted to confirm the current path rather than trigger revision.
structured_tensions.source_quote: adaptation vs confirmation-bias: feedback is interpreted to confirm the current adaptation path rather than trigger genuine revision.

curation_notes.summary: Relation surface stays inside the current graph vocabulary and keeps omission stronger than weak forcing.
donor_drops: Did not widen Wave 3 target ids or import donor-shaped relation neighborhoods to rescue weak local grounding.
open_questions: Some source-real neighbors remain omitted because the current graph vocabulary would force weaker mappings than this conservative pass allows.

allies: Wave 4 candidacy remains observational only and is noted only in batch artifacts.
antagonists: No multihop or higher-order semantics were introduced in these Wave 3 files.
structured_tensions: Explicit tensions were preserved only where the raw source clearly earned a current-vocabulary target.
